title: Use extra requirements to build readthedocs
body:
The reference for this change is [here](https://docs.readthedocs.com/platform/stable/config-file/v2.html#packages) although I don't know why it broke in version 4.9.0

Fixes: https://github.com/containers/podman-py/issues/532

cc: @jwhonce @Edward5hen
